description: A VirtualService routes to a subset with no matching DestinationRule, blackholing traffic.
body: Failure mode: a VirtualService references a subset name that no DestinationRule defines (typo, deleted rule, or label mismatch), so the proxy has no cluster for it and requests fail or blackhole. Detection signals: 503 with no_healthy_upstream/no_cluster response flags, the proxy config missing the cluster, and the subset name not present in any DestinationRule. Do not assume the route is the problem. Safer fallback: define the subset in a DestinationRule with labels that actually match running pods, confirm the cluster appears in the proxy config, and validate routing with a test request before shifting production weight.
